summary: Premium UI redesign testing completed. Main pages (Login, CustomerHome, AdminDashboard, RiderDashboard header/tabs, VisitCart, AIChatbot) have premium styling with teal (#04473C), gold (#C6A87C), Playfair Display fonts, and no Neo-brutalist shadows. However, several secondary pages and components still retain Neo-brutalist styling.

issues: Still has harsh black borders (border-2 border-[#111111])
Still has harsh black borders (border-2 border-[#111111])
Still has Neo-brutalist shadows in task completion form

action_items: Update PaymentSuccess.js to use premium styling (replace shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#111111] with subtle shadows, replace border-[#111111] with border-[#E5E1DB])
Update PackersMovers.js to use premium styling
Update AdvertiseWithUs.js to use premium styling
Update AIAdGenerator.js component to use premium styling
Update AppSettingsPanel.js component to use premium styling
Update InventoryPanel.js component to use premium styling
Update ToLetTasksPanel.js component to use premium styling
Update RiderDashboard.js ToLet Tasks and Wallet tabs to use premium styling instead of neo-card class
critical_code_review_comments: Main requested pages (Login, CustomerHome, AdminDashboard, RiderDashboard main view, PropertyDetail, VisitCart, AIChatbot) have been successfully updated to premium styling
Premium color scheme (#04473C teal, #C6A87C gold, #FDFCFB background) is correctly applied to main pages
Playfair Display font is used for headings, Outfit for body text
btn-primary and btn-secondary classes use correct premium teal colors
glass-header class provides premium frosted glass effect
No Neo-brutalist shadows found on main tested pages
Secondary pages and admin components still need premium styling update

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Main pages pass, secondary pages need updates

context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium UI redesign is mostly complete for main pages. Secondary pages (PaymentSuccess, PackersMovers, AdvertiseWithUs) and admin components (AIAdGenerator, AppSettingsPanel, InventoryPanel, ToLetTasksPanel) still have Neo-brutalist styling that needs to be updated. The neo-card class in index.css has been updated to use premium styling, but some components still use inline Neo-brutalist classes.

login_page.details: Premium styling with teal colors, Playfair Display font, no Neo-brutalist elements

customer_home.details: Glass header, premium search bar, property cards with subtle borders, AI chatbot button

admin_dashboard.details: Premium header, stat cards with subtle borders, navigation tabs with teal accent

rider_dashboard_main.details: Premium header, online/offline toggle with teal styling, tab navigation

rider_dashboard_tasks_wallet.details: Still uses neo-card class and some Neo-brutalist elements in ToLet Tasks form

visit_cart.details: Premium styling with glass header, clean cart items, premium package selection

ai_chatbot.details: Premium teal header, gold accents, clean message bubbles

property_detail.details: Premium styling verified (page requires auth to view full content)
